summary: Phase 1 UI Architecture Overhaul VERIFIED. All new design system components, Dashboard (AI Command Center), Landing page, and Creation Canvas (StoryVideoPipeline) are working correctly. Dark theme, gradient text, purple CTAs, glass morphism, step indicators, suggestion chips, mode tabs, and form inputs all function as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Design system CSS variables in /app/frontend/src/design-system.css are properly implemented and applied
All data-testid attributes are present for interactive elements as specified
Navigation between Dashboard and Creation Canvas works correctly
Form validation working (50 char min for story, 3 char min for title)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 UI overhaul is complete and verified. All key pages load correctly with the new design system. Key data-testids verified: dashboard-page, command-center-prompt, universal-prompt-input, universal-prompt-submit, mode-tab-create/remix/publish, suggestion-chip-*, creation-tools-grid, tool-card-*, credits-panel, streak-panel, canvas-step-prompt/scenes/images/voices/preview, title-input, story-textarea, style-grid, generate-btn.

landing_page.details: Dark theme (#0B0F1A), gradient hero text, purple CTA buttons, glass nav, vs-page class applied

dashboard_ai_command_center.details: Universal prompt box with sparkle icon, suggestion chips populate input on click, Create/Remix/Publish mode tabs switch tool grid, credits/streak/daily challenge panels in right sidebar

universal_prompt_routing.details: Typing 'video' shows Story Video Studio suggestion, clicking routes to correct tool

suggestion_chips.details: 4 chips present (Instagram reel, photo to comic, kids story video, YouTube shorts), clicking populates prompt input

mode_tabs.details: Create (6 tools), Remix (4 tools), Publish (4 tools) - all switch correctly

creation_canvas_story_video.details: Step indicators in header (Prompt/Scenes/Images/Voice/Preview), title input, story textarea, animation style grid (6 options), target age selector, narrator voice selector, Generate Video button, Recent Videos sidebar

form_inputs.details: Title and story inputs accept text, character counter updates (157/10,000 shown), style/age/voice selectors work

navigation.details: Dashboard → Creation Canvas → Back to Dashboard navigation works correctly

design_system_css.details: CSS custom properties for colors, typography (Sora/Inter/JetBrains Mono), cards, buttons, animations all working

tests_executed: Landing page loads with new design system
Dashboard/AI Command Center loads with all elements
Universal prompt box routes to correct tool
Create/Remix/Publish mode tabs switch tool grid
StoryVideoPipeline creation canvas loads with step indicators
Form inputs (title, story, style, age, voice) work correctly
Generate button present and enabled with valid input
